prompt: I need to audit our React dashboard before launch next week. It's a data viz app with interactive charts, form inputs, and a dark mode toggle. Some users complained they couldn't navigate with keyboard only. How do I run a full WCAG AA audit including keyboard navigation to catch all accessibility issues?
expected_output: Clear guidance to run 4-layer audit (Lighthouse via DevTools, tab through all controls, check a11y tree for labels/roles, verify 4.5:1 contrast). Specific evidence paths. Verdict template that says PASS or FAIL with numbered issues.
